arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the S3 bucket object.

body.description: The content of the S3 object as a string.

bucket_key_enabled.description: Indicates if the bucket key is enabled for the S3 object.

cache_control.description: Specifies caching behavior along the request/reply chain.

content_disposition.description: Specifies presentational information for the object.

content_encoding.description: Specifies what content encodings have been applied to the object.

content_language.description: The language the content is in.

content_length.description: The size of the content in bytes.

content_type.description: A standard MIME type describing the format of the object data.

etag.description: The entity tag is an identifier for a specific version of the object.

expiration.description: The expiration date and rule for the object.

expires.description: The date and time at which the object is no longer cacheable.

id.description: The unique identifier of the S3 object.

last_modified.description: The date and time the object was last modified.

metadata.description: A map of metadata stored with the object in S3.

object_lock_legal_hold_status.description: The legal hold status for the S3 object.

object_lock_mode.description: The lock mode that is being applied to this S3 object.

object_lock_retain_until_date.description: The date until which the object is retained.

server_side_encryption.description: The server-side encryption algorithm used when storing this object in S3.

sse_kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS KMS key used for server-side encryption.

storage_class.description: The storage class of the S3 object.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the object.

version_id.description: The version ID of the object.

website_redirect_location.description: The URL to which a 301 redirect should be made for this object.
